positive: Minimalist celestial watercolor illustration: a crescent moon cradling a cluster of geometric, stylized constellations. The palette is muted deep indigo, sapphire blue, creamy gold, and soft ethereal lavender. The composition features clean, flowing lines and distinct color blocking, suitable for a central, easily recognizable print on clothing. Incorporate delicate stardust elements and soft negative space. Whimsical yet sophisticated, with a fine art, hand-painted quality. Clean silhouette, high contrast between the glowing gold stars and the deep blue background. Perfect for apparel.
